testcase.name: Add new customer
testcase.system-out: Given User Launch the Browser...............................................passed When user opens URL "https://admin-demo.nopcommerce.com/login?ReturnUrl=%2Fadmin%2F".passed And user enters the Email as "admin@yourstore.com" and password as "admin"..passed And Click on login button...................................................passed Then user can view Dashboard................................................passed When user clicks on Customer menu...........................................passed And click on customer menu item.............................................passed And click on add new Button.................................................passed Then user can view Add new customer page....................................passed When user enter cutomer info................................................passed And click on Save button....................................................passed Then user can view confirmation message "The new customer has been added successfully.".passed Then close browser..........................................................passed

testcase.name: Search customer by Email
testcase.system-out: Given User Launch the Browser...............................................passed When user opens URL "https://admin-demo.nopcommerce.com/login?ReturnUrl=%2Fadmin%2F".passed And user enters the Email as "admin@yourstore.com" and password as "admin"..passed And Click on login button...................................................passed Then user can view Dashboard................................................passed When user clicks on Customer menu...........................................passed And click on customer menu item.............................................passed And customer enter email....................................................passed When click on search button.................................................passed Then close browser..........................................................passed

testcase.name: Search by customer Name
testcase.system-out: Given User Launch the Browser...............................................passed When user opens URL "https://admin-demo.nopcommerce.com/login?ReturnUrl=%2Fadmin%2F".passed And user enters the Email as "admin@yourstore.com" and password as "admin"..passed And Click on login button...................................................passed Then user can view Dashboard................................................passed When user clicks on Customer menu...........................................passed And click on customer menu item.............................................passed And customer enter firstname................................................passed And customer enter Lastname.................................................passed When click on search button.................................................passed Then close browser..........................................................passed
